_publications._publicationTitle: Genome-wide association study of café-au-lait macule number in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: two SNPs in LD ( r 2 = 1, D' = 1) on chromosome 6, rs12190451 and rs3799603, in the intronic region of RPS6KA2 , had a borderline genome‐wide significant association ( p = 7.4 × 10 −8 )
details: Identified two SNPs with borderline genome-wide significant association (p = 7.4 × 10^-8) with CALM number in CALM1 cohort
